name: @ds/dskit
description: Design system audit CLI — extract tokens, identify inconsistencies, generate client reports

scripts.build:
mkdir -p dist && node -e "import('fs').then(fs=>fs.writeFileSync('dist/dskit','#!/bin/bash
export PATH="\$HOME/.bun/bin:\$PATH"
exec bun run "\$(dirname "\$0")/../src/index.ts" "\$@"
'))" && chmod +x dist/dskit
